     the Fermi energy is    -0.5933 ev

!    total energy              =   -6581.00657819 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.7E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26419697 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137559.80143670 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69432.35310894 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2713.52338535 Ry
